name: Kakao Maps API
description: Kakao Maps JavaScript, REST and Mobility APIs for Korean map tiles, local search and routing.

seo.title: Kakao Maps API — Maps / Geolocation / Routing
seo.meta_description: Kakao Maps API: Kakao Maps JavaScript, REST and Mobility APIs for Korean map tiles, local search and routing.

when_to_use: Korean map tiles and POI search for domestic mobile apps
Routing and navigation APIs for Korean logistics platforms
Address validation and geocoding for Korean addresses
Local business search integrated into Korean consumer apps
Map rendering in Korean apps without Google Maps licensing

pros: Default mapping platform for Korean users
Accurate Korean POI and address data
Mobility APIs include routing and taxi
Free tier works for most small apps
cons: Coverage quality outside Korea is poor
Billing and account setup requires local entity
review.verdict: Must-use if you ship maps to Korean users; useless outside the peninsula.
review.best_for: Apps serving Korean users needing local POI accuracy
review.not_for: Global apps or projects without Korean market focus
